title: totem_anime_pak
description:
My anime texture pack, for those who are fond of anime and want to keep their favorite character always at hand.
In order for the texture pack to work, you need OptiFine or if on Fabric (CIT Resewn).
body:
My anime texture pack, for those who are fond of anime and want to keep their favorite character always at hand.
In order for the texture pack to work, you need OptiFine or if on Fabric (CIT Resewn).
